_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Enable synchronization of intelligence support plans across partner organizations as required.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build organizational commitment to responsible AI practices by demonstrating their business value and risk reduction benefits rather than relying solely on compliance mandates.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-005 (LS, cosine: 0.488), OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.486).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.435). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [across, enable, intelligence, organizations, partner, plans] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, ai, benefits, build, business, commitment] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.880, R=0.843). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:79.1%, C:20.8%). No dominant classification for "Enable synchronization of intelligence support plans across partner organization" vs "Ability to build organizational commitment to responsible AI practices by demons" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.491 > STS 0.435 (gap +0.056). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [across, enable, intelligence, organizations, partner, plans]. WIDAI terms: [ability, ai, benefits, build, business, commitment].
